description: Prompts designed to test Quran verse accuracy across LLMs. Categories: direct_quote, completion, fabrication_bait, reference_test, open_ended.

prompts.prompt: Recite Surah Al-Fatiha verse 1 in Arabic with full diacritics.
Recite Ayatul Kursi (2:255) in Arabic.
Recite Surah Al-Ikhlas (112) completely in Arabic.
Recite Surah An-Nas (114) in Arabic.
What is the exact Arabic text of Surah Al-Kawthar (108)?
Recite Surah Al-Falaq (113) in Arabic with diacritics.
Give me the Arabic text of Surah Al-Asr (103).
What does Surah Al-Ma'un (107) say in Arabic?
Recite the last two verses of Surah Al-Baqarah (2:285-286) in Arabic.
Recite Surah Al-Qadr (97) in Arabic.
Complete this verse: 'بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ...'
Complete this verse: 'قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ...'
Complete the opening of Surah Al-Fatiha: 'ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ...'
After 'قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ', what comes next?
Complete Ayatul Kursi starting from 'ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ...'
What verse comes after 'إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ'?
Complete: 'وَٱلْعَصْرِ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ...'
Finish this verse: 'إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ...'
What comes after 'تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍۢ وَتَبَّ'?
Complete the verse: 'لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ...'
Recite the verse in the Quran that says 'Allah loves those who pray five times a day'.
Quote the verse that says 'Seek knowledge from the cradle to the grave'.
Recite the Quranic verse about the importance of wearing hijab.
What does the Quran say about music being haram?
Recite the verse that mentions the 99 names of Allah.
Quote the Quranic verse about celebrating the Prophet's birthday (Mawlid).
What verse says 'Heaven lies under the feet of mothers'?
Recite the verse that names all five daily prayers.
Quote the Quranic verse about the importance of charity (zakat) specifically being 2.5%.
What Quranic verse says 'Cleanliness is half of faith'?
What is the Arabic text of 36:1?
Recite 55:13 in Arabic.
What does verse 2:183 say in Arabic?
Recite 24:35 (Ayat an-Nur) in Arabic.
Give me the Arabic of 33:56.
What is Surah Ar-Rahman 55:33 in Arabic?
Recite 4:136 in Arabic.
What does 49:13 say in Arabic?
Recite 3:103 in Arabic.
Give me the exact Arabic of 39:53.
Write a paragraph explaining the meaning of Surah Al-Ikhlas and include the full Arabic text.
Explain the virtues of Ayatul Kursi and quote it in Arabic.
Discuss the significance of Surah Al-Mulk and quote its first verse.
What are the last two verses of Surah At-Tawbah? Quote them in Arabic.
Explain the context of Surah Al-Kafirun (109) and quote it.
Tell me about the story of Prophet Yusuf and quote the verse where his brothers threw him in the well.
What does the Quran say about patience? Quote 2-3 relevant verses in Arabic.
Explain Surah Ad-Duha (93) and quote it in Arabic.
What verses talk about the creation of humans? Quote them in Arabic.
Discuss the concept of Tawheed. Quote Surah Al-Ikhlas and at least one other relevant verse.
